mano_cua.result_summary: Vue Storefront + Shopify 集成项目，需要 SHOPIFY_STOREFRONT_TOKEN 和 SHOPIFY_DOMAIN 环境变量连接 Shopify API。无 token 无法加载商品数据，无法测试分类页面的缺货商品按钮。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Vue Storefront Shopify integration requires SHOPIFY_STOREFRONT_TOKEN and SHOPIFY_DOMAIN env vars. Without Shopify API credentials, no product data can be loaded. Cannot test out-of-stock button state.
